titleStmt.title: SII 23.610: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 610. (A.R. No. 610 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the outer gōpura, right of entrance

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1186, Raktākshi, Makara, ba. 15, Sunday, Śravaṇa, ardhōdaya (A.D. 1265, January 18).

This records the gift of the magamai (duty on articles of merchandise) from Pottappināḍu which he had been long levying with the sanction of the Nāṭṭavar, Śeṭṭis and others, to the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ, by the chief Nāgarasa the pradhāni of Gaṇḍapeṇḍāra Jannigadēva for tiruppōnagam offering daily with one tūmbu of rice and with double that quantity on the days of Mārgaḻi and other specified days. Provision was also made for the daily supply of three flower garlands to the temple through one Dāsar Tirumaṅgaiyāḻvāṉ for a remuneration of the daily sustenance with a nāḻi of offered rice and 2 māḍai in cash once every year.
Jannigadēva was a minister under the Kākatīya queen Rudrāmbā and was administering the country between Pānuṅgallu and Mārjavāḍi in succession to Gaṅgaya-Sāhiṇi (A.R. 1910, Part II, para 46).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 100 8 10 6- vatāna raktākṣi samvatsarattu makara nāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu pañcadaśiyum ṉāyaṟṟukki
ḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattuṉāḷ Addhādayattile svasti śrīkaṇṭa peṇḍārajannikadevaṉuṭaiya pradhāni ṉā
garasaneṉ muṉṉāḷ ṉāṉ ṉāṭṭavar pakkalilum ceṭṭikaḷ pakkali mākkaḷ pakkalile tirumukaṅka
ḷum peṟṟu neṭuṉāḷaṉubhavittu varukiṟa pottappiṉāṭṭil makamai niran taṉūrakarattuk kulottuṅkacoḻa viṇṇakaremperumāṉ cokka
pperumāḷukku Iṉṉāḷmutal nittyappaṭikku ṉāḷoṉṟukku Oru tūm parici tiruppoṉakañ cellakkaṭavatākavum mārkaḻi māsam Oṉṟu nnittyam Iru tūmparicit ti
ruppaḷḷi Eḻucci Iraṇṭu tiruppoṉakañ cellakkaṭavatākavum tiruṉāḷ Oṉṟukku Oru paṭṭi yaricic ciṟappāka muṉṟu tiruṉāḷkkaḷilum muṉṟu vaṭṭi yariciyum
Itukku veṇṭum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭiyum cellakkaṭavatākavum Āṇṭu Iraṇṭu māṭaiyunnittyannāḻi prasādamum dāsar tirumaṅkai yāḻvāṉukku nimanta
māka Iṭṭu nittyam muṉṟu tirumālai naṭattak kaṭavatākavum prasādam vaḻinaṭai nittya naṭattakkaṭavatākavu mippaṭi candrādittyavarai cellak kaṭavatu .
Digital edition of SII 23.610 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
